entertainment.headline: Deepika Padukone defends her silence on Dhurandhar 2, trolls the troll Deepika Padukone put an end to the social media gossip about her silence on Ranveer Singh's blockbuster Dhurandhar: The Revenge. The film, set against the 2020 Indo-China conflict, aims to celebrate India and its soldiers without glorifying war.

Dhurandhar 2 beats Baahubali 2: The Conclusion, crosses Rs 1,033 crore in 20 days It's day 20 and there's no stopping for Dhurandhar 2. The actioner continues its strong box office run, crossing Rs 1,033 crore nett in India and overtaking Baahubali 2.

Badshah pledges women's empowerment song, education for 50 underprivileged girls Rapper Badshah pledged a women's empowerment track within four months amid legal scrutiny over his controversial song, Tateeree. He also promised to sponsor education for 50 underprivileged girls.

However, it arrives at a moment when several high-profile filmmakers internationally have moved away from excessive reliance on digital tools.

general news.headline: US and Iran agree to 2-week truce, Tehran to open Strait of Hormuz Live UpdatesUS President Donald Trump agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran less than two hours before his deadline for Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face devastating strikes on its civilian infrastructure.
Iran, Oman get to levy Hormuz transit fee under 2-week ceasefire plan: ReportThe two-week ceasefire with the US includes fee collection by Iran and Oman for Strait passage.

Iran claims 'historic victory' after Trump announces truce, unveils 10-point planIn a statement shortly after Donald Trump's announcement on Tuesday night, Iran's Supreme National Security Council said the US had suspended its "bombing and attack" campaign and accepted the two-week, "double-sided" ceasefire after being compelled by Tehran's military and political pressure.

Can Trump, like Netanyahu, be charged for war crimes?US President Donald Trump has threatened to bomb Iran's civilian infrastructure and send the country back to the Stone Age. Deepika Padukone defends her silence on Dhurandhar 2, trolls the trollDeepika Padukone put an end to the social media gossip about her silence on Ranveer Singh's blockbuster Dhurandhar: The Revenge. The actor gave a witty reply on Instagram, proving support isn't always loud.

Live: Iran Supreme Leader instructs all units to cease fire as alerts sound in GulfUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: In a sudden shift from threats to pause, Donald Trump said he would halt US military action against Iran, at least for now, signalling a possible opening for diplomacy. Posting on Truth Social, Trump said, "I agree to suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks," framing the move as part of a broader push toward a ceasefire. The decision, he said, followed conversations with Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Army chief Asim Munir, who urged him to hold off on planned strikes. Iran has accepted Pakistan's two-week ceasefire proposal. The ceasefire has been approved by the country's new supreme leader, signalling a possible opening for de-escalation. Iran said talks with the US should not be interpreted as signalling the end of the war, adding that its 10-point proposal calls for lifting all primary and secondary sanctions, full compensation payments, and the release of all frozen Iranian assets. Tehran said it will only accept the war's conclusion once all details are finalised in line with the 10-point plan, Iranian media reported. Negotiations with the US are to be held in Islamabad on 10th April (Friday) to finalise details. Catch all the live updates at Indiatoday.in.
